title: solidago multiradiata var. scopulorum
intro: Solidago multiradiata var. scopulorum, also known as Mountain Goldenrod, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Mountain Goldenrod include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also sometimes used in traditional medicine to create salves and ointments for topical application.
